'''√g-f-h''' ('''kagafah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadsorb|deadsorb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadsorb|deadsorb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-f-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagafah
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigafah || jigafah || shigafah || kigafah
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugafah || jujugafah || shushugafah || kukugafah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugafah || jugafah || shugafah || kugafah
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugafah || jugafah || shugafah || kugafah
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegafah || jegafah || shegafah || kegafah
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogafah || jojogafah || shoshogafah || kokogafah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogafah || jogafah || shogafah || kogafah
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogafah || jogafah || shogafah || kogafah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gafah || gafah || gafah || gafah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gafah || gafah || gafah || gafah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gafah || gafah || gafah || gafah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gafah || gafah || gafah || gafah
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægafah || jægafah || shægafah || kægafah
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagafah || jajagafah || shashagafah || kakagafah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagafah || jagafah || shagafah || kagafah
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagafah || jagafah || shagafah || kagafah
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagafah
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagafah
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagafah
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagafahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagafahnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagafahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagafahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagafahnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagafahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagafahro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagafahnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagafahro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagafahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagafahnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagafahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagafahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagafahnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagafahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagafahng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagafahnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagafahng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagafahya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagafahnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagafahya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagafahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagafahnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagafahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagafahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagafahnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagafahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagafahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagafahnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagafahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagafahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagafahnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagafahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagafahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagafahnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagafahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagafahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagafahnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagafahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagafahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagafahnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagafahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagafahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagafahnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagafahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagafahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagafahnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagafahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagafahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagafahnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagafahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagafahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagafahnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagafahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagafahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagafahnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagafahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagafahmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagafahnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagafahmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
